close_reason: Added Dependency versions section to crate-level docs
description: All three signer types implement signature::Signer<S> from the signature crate (v2 as pinned in the workspace). The signature::Error type appears in every try_sign() return type. Any caller must depend on the same major version of signature as this crate, or they get link errors from mismatched types. The crate-level docs and README do not state this coupling, so callers may unexpectedly find themselves forced to upgrade or downgrade their own signature dependency to match. The version coupling should be documented explicitly.
title: signature crate major version locked into public API without documentation
